originalRequest: Update the Status field on Closed Won Opportunities to reflect the new naming convention, where Status equals 'Won' should be changed to 'Closed-Won'

explicitRequirements.text: Update the Status field on Closed Won Opportunities to reflect the new naming convention, where Status equals 'Won' should be changed to 'Closed-Won'

clarificationNeeded.question: What is the expected timeline for this work?
How will we know when this is complete? What are the success criteria?
